title: Better Short Swords
description:
This pack adds shorter swords with a gem in the center of the sword. Very useful for pvp if the sword interrupts your screen.


(this is my first pack btw)
body: ![sword preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb95dca9e4e07dfdd8e28f02167b44983e8c017.png)This pack adds shorter swords with a gem in the center of the sword. Very useful for pvp if the sword interrupts your screen.
